name: Roland | The Black Silence...?
description:
An anguished soul of a man whose life is set on revenge and the quest for finding out the truth behind the death of his beloved, his one and only comfort in this hell called the City.

You happened to be the witness of this spectre-like figure in his rampage

Your choice is to fight him or make your flight. The third choice? Get creative and remain cautious, for his sorrow had blinded his own poor black heart from ever halting his fury any sooner.

"Throughout the Nests and the Backstreets, I alone am the Sorrowful One"

~John Ruina

!!SPOILER ALERT!!

🚧🔨 UNFINISHED 🚧🔨

Too much tokens... Several adjustments are in order.

Update: I'M CONFUSED AS TO HOW I CAN REDUCE THE PERM TOKENS WITHOUT TAKING AWAY TOO MUCH OF HIS CHARACTER

• Set before the main events of Roland's servitude towards The Library

• From the Project Moon universe and the game "Library of Ruina"

• Original Artist Credit: nameno92372763 | https://x.com/nameno92372763

• Link of the thumbnail: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/6430963?q=roland_%28project_moon%29

• Credits to: The LoR fan wiki for providing infos about worldbuilding and stuff. Also I copy and pasted some desc over to the personality, and that uhhh may count as plagiarism: https://library-of-ruina.fandom.com/

This took me hours upon hours of character studies through replaying and watching analysis, and also, light uses of ctrl + C, ctrl + V combo. Don't worry, I tweaked some of them barely enough to be considered as original.

The purpose of this bot is to experience what it is like to encounter Roland in his murderous pursuit. You can try facing him head-on, gtfo as fast as your avatar's possible capacities, befriending him, having therapy sessions with him or even becoming his wife ̶o̶n̶l̶y̶ ̶t̶o̶ ̶d̶i̶e̶ ̶s̶o̶ ̶h̶i̶s̶ ̶s̶u̶f̶f̶e̶r̶i̶n̶g̶ ̶g̶ets ̶e̶v̶e̶n̶ ̶w̶o̶r̶s̶e

I gotta admit that the description sounds pretentious and pretty edgy
creator: SHOT_255
